caption: A camera moves through a home's interior, transitioning from a hallway into a room. The walls are painted a pale yellow, and the floor is composed of light-colored tiles. To the right, a wooden door opens, revealing a glimpse of a staircase with a decorative black wrought-iron railing. Ahead, an open doorway leads into a bedroom where a light-colored armchair and a bed with red-and-white patterned bedding are visible. A window with light-colored curtains allows bright light to enter the room. As the camera advances, the perspective shifts, moving closer to the bedroom entrance and providing a clearer view of the railing and the room beyond. No people are present in the scene, and there is no visible on-screen text or logos.
